# Forward Commitments Valuation L2

> Price and value forward commitments — arbitrage-free carry model, equity/IR/FX/fixed-income forwards, interest rate and currency swaps, equity swap pricing and valuation

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** derivatives · forwards · futures · swaps · carry-arbitrage · cfa-level-2

## What this does

Price and value forward commitments — arbitrage-free carry model, equity/IR/FX/fixed-income forwards, interest rate and currency swaps, equity swap pricing and valuation

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **contract_id** *(text, required)* — Contract identifier
- **contract_type** *(select, required)* — equity_forward | ir_forward | fx_forward | fi_forward | ir_swap | fx_swap | equity_swap

## What must be true

- **arbitrage_free_principle → law_of_one_price:** Forward price set so no riskless profit exists
- **arbitrage_free_principle → replication:** Long forward = leveraged long spot minus carry costs
- **carry_arbitrage_no_cash_flows → formula:** F0 = S0 × (1+r)^T
- **carry_arbitrage_no_cash_flows → interpretation:** Future value of spot at risk-free rate
- **carry_arbitrage_with_cash_flows → formula:** F0 = (S0 − PV_cashflows) × (1+r)^T
- **carry_arbitrage_with_cash_flows → cash_flows:** Dividends, coupons, storage costs, convenience yield
- **equity_forwards_futures → continuous:** F0 = S0 × e^{(r−q)T}
- **equity_forwards_futures → dividend_adjusted:** Subtract PV of dividends from spot
- **equity_forwards_futures → index_futures:** Use continuously compounded dividend yield
- **ir_forwards_fra → fra_payoff:** Notional × (MRR − FRA rate) × period / (1 + MRR × period)
- **ir_forwards_fra → settlement:** Discounted at MRR; paid at start of reference period
- **fi_forward → formula:** F0 = (B0 − PV_coupon) × (1+r)^T
- **fi_forward → conversion_factor:** Treasury futures use cheapest-to-deliver bond
- **forward_vs_futures → marking_to_market:** Futures marked daily; T-bills as margin
- **forward_vs_futures → convexity_adjustment:** IR futures priced below equivalent forwards
- **ir_swap → fixed_rate:** Set so swap has zero value at inception
- **ir_swap → value_after_inception:** PV of remaining fixed − PV of remaining floating
- **ir_swap → pricing:** Derived from spot LIBOR/term rates
- **fx_swap → pricing:** Based on covered interest rate parity
- **fx_swap → value:** Difference in PV of fixed legs in two currencies
- **equity_swap → pay_fixed_receive_equity:** Value = equity leg value − fixed annuity value
- **equity_swap → pricing:** Fixed rate = equity expected return minus funding spread; equilibrium sets zero value
- **validation → contract_required:** contract_id present
- **validation → valid_type:** contract_type in allowed set

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Price Forward Commitment** — when contract_id exists; contract_type in ["equity_forward","ir_forward","fx_forward","fi_forward","ir_swap","fx_swap","equity_swap"], then call service; emit forward.priced. _Why: Price or value forward commitment contract._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Type** — when contract_type not_in ["equity_forward","ir_forward","fx_forward","fi_forward","ir_swap","fx_swap","equity_swap"], then emit forward.rejected. _Why: Unsupported contract type._ *(error: `FORWARD_INVALID_TYPE`)*

## Errors it can return

- `FORWARD_INVALID_TYPE` — contract_type must be one of the supported forward commitment types

## Events

**`forward.priced`**
  Payload: `contract_id`, `contract_type`, `forward_price`, `current_value`

**`forward.rejected`**
  Payload: `contract_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **contingent-claims-valuation-l2** *(recommended)*
